name: Voice Cloning Worker
description: Zero-shot voice cloning from 5-30s reference audio. Clone any voice and generate speech in 23 languages. Powered by Chatterbox TTS (MIT license).

presets.name: Voice Clone - Turbo (English)
presets.description: Fast English voice cloning with Chatterbox Turbo. 350M params, optimized for speed. Supports paralinguistic tags ([laugh], [cough]).

presets.name: Voice Clone - Multilingual (23 languages)
presets.description: Cross-lingual voice cloning with Chatterbox Multilingual. 500M params. Clone a voice in one language, generate speech in any of 23 languages.

presets.name: Voice Clone - Original (English, Emotion Control)
presets.description: English voice cloning with emotion/expressiveness control. 500M params. Adjust exaggeration and cfg_weight for creative voice generation.
